studies.title: EVALUATION OF THE IMPACT OF MEBIX ON HBA1C IN PATIENTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS IN DAILY PRACTICE

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the 'mebix' app, as indicated by the title and detailed description in the full text. The intervention involves the use of the mebix app for patients with type 2 diabetes, matching the product description.

_classification.reason: The study involves an intervention group using the mebix app and a control group using a placebo app, with random allocation to these groups, which is characteristic of a randomized controlled trial.

studies.title: mebix DMT2 - the digital therapy assistant for patients with diabetes mellitus type 2
